Earnest request to the management committee to streamline the process of review so that employees get enough time to present it properly particularly without sacrificing their health.
Food is be served in office but no transport facility for those who are working day & night. Its really risky to drive down at night if you have not slept since 4-5days due to this deadly work pressure. Isn't it your responsibility to look into employees well being / health /where in turn they are working for your growth?
